headline: Cox Media fined after bragging it spied on users through their phones
summary: Cox Media, MindSift, and 1010 Digital Works were fined by the FTC. They claimed they secretly spied on users via phones and smart devices. The companies now face penalties for their controversial marketing claims.

headline: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
summary: Memorial Day sales are underway with discounts on various items. Find deals on portable speakers, solar lights, and more tech. It's an ideal time to purchase essentials for outdoor activities.

headline: Pope Leo calls for being ‘profoundly human’ in the age of AI
summary: Pope Leo XIV released his first major papal document, "Magnifica Humanitas." The manifesto warns against the risks of unconstrained AI and tech power. He discusses AI's impact on warfare, labor, and safeguarding humanity.

headline: Here are our favorite last-minute deals from REI’s giant Anniversary Sale
summary: REI's annual Anniversary Sale, their biggest of the year, is ongoing. Save on outdoor essentials like tents, sleeping pads, and stoves. It's a prime opportunity to stock up for upcoming camping trips.

headline: Save 20% Off the Apple AirPods Pro 3 Earbuds During the Amazon Memorial Day Sale
summary: Apple AirPods Pro 3 earbuds are 20% off at Amazon. This Memorial Day sale offers significant savings. Grab the best noise-canceling earbuds for iPhone users.

headline: The 2026 MacBook Air With New Apple M5 Chip Drops to the Lowest Price Ever for Memorial Day
summary: The 2026 MacBook Air with the M5 chip is at its lowest price. Amazon offers the laptop for $200 less than Apple Store. This Memorial Day deal is a rare opportunity for a new MacBook.

headline: The Secretlab Memorial Day Sale Has Great Deals on Limited Edition Themed Gaming Chairs
summary: Secretlab's Memorial Day Sale features discounts on gaming chairs. Find deals on limited edition chairs with licensed IPs. Popular themes include Genshin Impact, One Piece, and League of Legends.

headline: Save $2,400 Off the Alienware 16X Aurora RTX 5070 Gaming Laptop Loaded With 64GB of RAM and 4TB SSD
summary: The Alienware 16X Aurora RTX 5070 gaming laptop is $2,400 off. It boasts 64GB RAM and a 4TB SSD for premium performance. This Dell Memorial Day sale offers strong gaming at a discounted price.

headline: Former SNP chief executive Peter Murrell in custody after admitting £400,000 embezzlement
summary: Peter Murrell, former SNP chief executive, is in custody. He admitted embezzling £400,000. Murrell is the estranged husband of ex-First Minister Nicola Sturgeon.

headline: The questions raised by the Murrell embezzlement controversy
summary: The Murrell embezzlement case has plagued the SNP for five years. The police investigation began five years ago. The controversy continues to raise significant questions for the party.

headline: Hottest May day on record in UK as temperatures pass 34C
summary: The UK experienced its hottest May day on record, exceeding 34C. This follows the warmest May night on Sunday, reaching 19.4C. Record-breaking temperatures highlight an unusual heatwave.

headline: Woman dies after being shot outside Sheffield bar
summary: A 30-year-old woman died after being shot outside a Sheffield bar. She was found with serious injuries early Monday morning. Three suspects have been taken into custody following the incident.
